author: Kyle | I will never PM you 1st
msg: Hello everyone 😃 Happy new week!

author: Kyle | I will never PM you 1st
msg:
[Photo] 🤝 **Unity Network - The Big Picture**

Unity brings together:
• Global device diversity
• Wi-Fi + cellular intelligence
• A massive shared economy
• Telco-grade, multi-node architecture
• Enterprise-level orchestration
• Near-infinite scalability

A live, functioning global network expanding across tens of thousands of devices, cities, and countries.
And this is just the foundation.

The next phase unlocks deeper coordination, broader participation, and entirely new classes of network tasks, all powered by the same distributed edge network.

Deployment is active. Momentum is real.
What’s coming next scales everything.

🔗 https://x.com/UnityNodesIO/status/2018205250134446149

🤝 **Official Unity** **Resources**
[**Unity**](https://unitynodes.io/) | [**Unity Litepaper**](https://unitynodes.io/documents/litepaper.pdf) | [**QR Code Login**](https://uno.unitynodes.io/) | [**Manage**](https://manage.unitynodes.io/) | [**Telegram**](https://t.me/unitynodes) | [**X**](https://x.com/UnityNodesIO) | [**YouTube**](https://youtube.com/@UnityNodesIO) | [**Bug Report**](https://unitynodes.io/bug-report) | [**Verification Bot**](https://t.me/UnityNetworkVerificationBot)

author: $Limitless
msg:
For me, WMC is the world upside down.

I have been in crypto for a while, and one thing is clear. 
A project needs enough liquidity!

As far as I know, we have no CEX or DEX with WMC...

Here is some more irony.

I do not care much about some delays as long as I believe we are getting there.
I do not care much about not earning enough yet, because I am still a believer.

The thing I care about most. Above anything else!

I want to participate in the process.

Not being able to participate is frustrating me the most!

author: Quoia75
msg:
Tiered performance rewards - at bare minimum maintain great uptime.
If you maintain great uptime plus opt into higher paying tasks - Rock Star status.

License revoked only if you don't meet the minimum uptime requirements.

At least this is how I would approach it.

author: Daano
msg: #amaquestions how do we know (for sure) that the data collected and send back from unity app isnt collecting personal data (or for now encrypted data) and is sold to data brokers etc?

author: Daano
msg: As in, i got this question from a potential ULO just now, and didnt know how to answer lol

author: James_WM_ENO
msg:
People worry about personal data all the time however platforms like Facebook, instagram tiktok all blatantly and openly sell personal data yet everyone loves to use them, someone mentioned it here last week 

It’s worth mentioning that fact to potential ULO’s although I’m confident unity does not use personal data

Edit : they don’t admit to selling personal data however they do share data with 3rd parties, they just don’t disclose that it’s actually sold
